auditable_entities.description: Core SaaS platform infrastructure, application security, data protection, and DevOps operations

auditable_entities.name: Sales & Go-to-Market

auditable_entities.description: Acquisition integration workstreams including technology consolidation, customer migration, and operational synergy realization for ImpactHours volunteer tracking platform

assessment_factors.name: Revenue Concentration
assessment_factors.description: Degree of dependency on top customers for revenue stability

assessment_factors.name: Data Sensitivity
assessment_factors.description: Classification level of data processed and stored

assessment_factors.name: Regulatory Exposure
assessment_factors.description: Level of regulatory scrutiny and compliance requirements

assessment_factors.name: Change Velocity
assessment_factors.description: Rate of organizational, process, or technology change

assessment_factors.name: Financial Materiality
assessment_factors.description: Dollar impact potential of issues in this area

assessment_factors.name: Control Maturity
assessment_factors.description: Sophistication and effectiveness of existing controls

factor_scores.rationale: Top 50 customers driving 19% spend increases indicates high concentration
Revenue recognition during acquisition creates material exposure
ImpactHours integration and mid-market divestiture create high change
Controls maturing but gaps in integration accounting
Strategic pivot from mid-market creates significant operational change
Early warning systems insufficient per board findings
Cash declined $38.4M with net cash at $1.4M - critical liquidity position
Active acquisition integration with technology and customer migration
Purchase price allocation and goodwill testing material

audits.name: ImpactHours Acquisition Integration Audit
audits.description: Assessment of acquisition accounting, integration controls, and purchase price allocation for ImpactHours volunteer tracking platform acquisition

audits.name: Revenue Recognition & ASC 606 Compliance Audit
audits.description: Comprehensive audit of revenue recognition practices, subscription billing controls, and ASC 606 compliance during strategic transformation

audits.name: Customer Retention & NRR Process Audit
audits.description: Evaluation of customer success processes, retention monitoring controls, and net revenue retention accuracy

audits.name: Data Privacy & Cross-Border Compliance Audit
audits.description: Assessment of GDPR, PIPEDA, and state privacy law compliance including data residency and cross-border transfer mechanisms

audits.name: Cash Management & Liquidity Controls Audit
audits.description: Urgent audit of cash flow monitoring, treasury operations, and liquidity management following significant cash position decline

audits.name: SOX Readiness Assessment
audits.description: Evaluation of financial reporting control environment maturity and SOX compliance readiness in preparation for potential liquidity event

audit_findings.title: Incomplete Purchase Price Allocation Documentation
audit_findings.criteria: ASC 805 requires comprehensive documentation of fair value determinations for acquired intangible assets
audit_findings.condition: Supporting documentation for customer relationship and technology intangible valuations was incomplete, with key assumptions undocumented
audit_findings.cause: Accelerated acquisition timeline reduced time for thorough valuation documentation
audit_findings.effect: Risk of material misstatement in goodwill and intangible asset balances; potential restatement exposure
audit_findings.recommendation: Complete valuation documentation within 30 days; implement acquisition accounting checklist for future transactions
audit_findings.management_response: Engaged external valuation specialist to complete documentation. Target completion by April 30.

audit_findings.title: Integration Milestone Tracking Deficiencies
audit_findings.criteria: Integration project management standards require formal milestone tracking with variance analysis
audit_findings.condition: Integration milestones were tracked informally; 3 of 12 milestones exceeded timeline by >2 weeks without documented variance analysis
audit_findings.cause: Lack of formal integration PMO structure during initial months
audit_findings.effect: Reduced visibility into integration risks; delayed identification of customer migration issues
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement formal integration PMO with weekly milestone reviews and variance reporting
audit_findings.management_response: Integration PMO established with dedicated project manager. Weekly status reporting implemented.

audit_findings.title: Revenue Recognition Timing Issues for Combined Offerings
audit_findings.criteria: ASC 606 requires proper identification of performance obligations in combined product offerings
audit_findings.condition: Initial combined Benevity+ImpactHours contracts did not properly distinguish performance obligations
audit_findings.cause: Sales team not adequately trained on new bundling requirements; contract templates not updated
audit_findings.effect: Potential revenue recognition errors in Q1 2025 of estimated $400K-$600K
audit_findings.recommendation: Retrain sales team; update contract templates; review all Q1 combined contracts for proper allocation
audit_findings.management_response: Revenue team reviewing all affected contracts. Training scheduled for April 15.

audit_findings.title: Variable Consideration Estimation Inconsistencies
audit_findings.criteria: ASC 606 requires consistent application of estimation methods for variable consideration
audit_findings.condition: Three different estimation methodologies observed across enterprise contracts with similar structures
audit_findings.cause: Insufficient guidance documentation for revenue accountants; turnover in revenue team
audit_findings.effect: Inconsistent revenue recognition patterns; audit trail complexity
audit_findings.recommendation: Develop standardized variable consideration estimation policy; implement quarterly training
audit_findings.management_response: Policy documentation in progress. Expected completion June 30.

audit_findings.title: Contract Modification Controls Gap
audit_findings.criteria: All contract modifications require documented approval and revenue impact assessment
audit_findings.condition: 12% of contract modifications lacked documented approval; 8% lacked revenue impact assessment
audit_findings.cause: Contract modification workflow not enforcing mandatory fields
audit_findings.effect: Potential unauthorized contract changes; revenue recognition timing errors
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement system-enforced approval workflow with mandatory impact assessment
audit_findings.management_response: Workflow updated with mandatory approval steps. Testing complete.

audit_findings.title: Customer Health Score Reliability Issues
audit_findings.criteria: Customer health scores must incorporate validated leading indicators of churn risk
audit_findings.condition: Health score algorithm failed to predict 67% of Q1-Q2 churned accounts; mid-market segment health scores particularly unreliable
audit_findings.cause: Algorithm not updated since 2023; distributed workforce usage patterns not incorporated
audit_findings.effect: Insufficient early warning for at-risk accounts; contributed to gross retention decline to 88-89%
audit_findings.recommendation: Redesign health score algorithm with validated churn predictors; implement quarterly model validation
audit_findings.management_response: Engaged data science team to redesign algorithm. Pilot testing in June.

audit_findings.title: Implementation Resource Allocation Controls
audit_findings.criteria: Implementation resources must be allocated based on customer complexity and risk assessment
audit_findings.condition: No formal resource allocation methodology; implementation delays in 34% of new enterprise customers
audit_findings.cause: Resource constraints during mid-market transition; lack of capacity planning model
audit_findings.effect: Customer dissatisfaction; delayed time-to-value contributing to early churn risk
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement capacity planning model; establish resource allocation governance committee
audit_findings.management_response: Capacity model development underway. New CSM hires authorized.

audit_findings.title: NRR Calculation Methodology Inconsistency
audit_findings.criteria: NRR calculation must follow documented methodology consistent with investor reporting
audit_findings.condition: Mid-market divestiture customers inconsistently excluded from NRR calculations across quarters
audit_findings.cause: Segment definition changes during divestiture not formally documented in calculation methodology
audit_findings.effect: NRR volatility partially attributable to methodology changes vs. true performance
audit_findings.recommendation: Document NRR methodology changes; implement quarterly reconciliation to investor definitions

audit_findings.title: Cross-Border Data Transfer Documentation
audit_findings.criteria: All cross-border data transfers must have documented legal basis and transfer impact assessments
audit_findings.condition: 2 of 15 EU-Canada transfer mechanisms lacked current transfer impact assessments
audit_findings.cause: TIA refresh process not fully automated; volume of assessments increased with EMEA expansion
audit_findings.effect: Minor compliance documentation gap; low probability of regulatory action
audit_findings.recommendation: Automate TIA refresh reminders; complete outstanding assessments within 60 days
audit_findings.management_response: Assessments scheduled for completion. Automation enhancement in Q4 roadmap.

audit_findings.title: Cash Flow Forecasting Accuracy Deficiencies
audit_findings.criteria: Rolling 13-week cash flow forecast variance should not exceed 10% of actual
audit_findings.condition: Q3-Q4 2024 cash flow forecast variances exceeded 25%; $38.4M cash decline not adequately anticipated
audit_findings.cause: Integration costs, restructuring charges, and new logo underperformance not properly modeled
audit_findings.effect: Liquidity position deteriorated without adequate advance warning to management; net cash reduced to $1.4M
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement enhanced cash forecasting model; establish weekly liquidity dashboard; create cash reserve policy
audit_findings.management_response: New forecasting model implemented. Weekly liquidity reviews initiated with CFO.

audit_findings.title: Working Capital Monitoring Gaps
audit_findings.criteria: Working capital metrics must be monitored weekly with defined escalation thresholds
audit_findings.condition: Working capital monitoring was monthly; no defined escalation thresholds; DSO increased 8 days without alerts
audit_findings.cause: Treasury function understaffed; monitoring frequency insufficient for growth stage
audit_findings.effect: Delayed identification of cash collection slowdowns; contributed to liquidity pressure
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement weekly working capital dashboard; define escalation thresholds; consider treasury analyst hire
audit_findings.management_response: Weekly dashboard implemented. Treasury analyst hired in March.

risks.name: Revenue Recognition Complexity During Integration
risks.description: Risk of material misstatement in revenue recognition due to ImpactHours acquisition integration, combined product offerings, and ASC 606 complexities

risks.name: Enterprise Customer Retention Deterioration
risks.description: Risk of gross retention declining below 90% threshold due to competitive pressure, product gaps in volunteer tracking, and customer concentration in enterprise segment

risks.name: Acquisition Integration Failure
risks.description: Risk of ImpactHours integration failing to achieve targeted synergies, customer migration issues, or technology consolidation delays impacting combined platform value

risks.name: Product Gap Competitive Disadvantage
risks.description: Risk of market share loss due to volunteer tracking product gaps for distributed workforces and competitive pressure from Blackbaud enterprise CRM integration and Submittable mid-market positioning

risks.name: Multi-Jurisdictional Privacy Compliance Failure
risks.description: Risk of regulatory enforcement or customer trust erosion due to non-compliance with GDPR, PIPEDA, US state privacy laws, and customer data residency requirements

risks.name: Liquidity and Cash Flow Crisis
risks.description: Risk of insufficient liquidity to fund operations due to cash consumption exceeding forecasts, integration costs, and new logo acquisition shortfalls impacting cash generation

risks.name: Strategic Transformation Execution Risk
risks.description: Risk of failed execution of enterprise-focused strategic pivot including mid-market divestiture, organizational restructuring, and go-to-market realignment impacting revenue growth

risks.name: New Logo Acquisition Pipeline Weakness
risks.description: Risk of continued underperformance in new logo acquisition due to sales pipeline management gaps, competitive win rate compression, and enterprise market penetration challenges

risks.name: Enterprise Customer Concentration
risks.description: Risk of revenue volatility and over-reliance on top enterprise customers following mid-market divestiture, with top 50 customers representing significant revenue share

risks.name: Platform Security and Data Breach
risks.description: Risk of unauthorized access to customer data, platform security vulnerabilities, or data breach impacting customer trust and regulatory standing

risks.name: Platform Availability and Service Disruption
risks.description: Risk of SaaS platform downtime or service degradation impacting customer operations and SLA compliance

risks.name: Key Person Dependency
risks.description: Risk of critical knowledge loss or operational disruption due to departure of key personnel during strategic transformation period

risks.name: Third-Party Vendor Dependency
risks.description: Risk of operational disruption or data exposure due to critical vendor failures or security incidents in key technology and service provider relationships

risks.name: Financial Reporting and SOX Readiness Gap
risks.description: Risk of material weakness in financial reporting controls impacting investor confidence or delaying potential liquidity event

risks.name: ESG Reporting and Compliance
risks.description: Risk of reputational damage or regulatory exposure due to inadequate ESG reporting practices as a CSR platform provider

risk_mitigation_plans.name: Revenue Recognition Integration Controls Enhancement
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Comprehensive plan to establish and validate revenue recognition controls for ImpactHours combined offerings

risk_mitigation_plans.name: Customer Health Score Algorithm Redesign
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Redesign customer health scoring algorithm to improve churn prediction accuracy with focus on enterprise segment

risk_mitigation_plans.name: Liquidity Management Enhancement
risk_mitigation_plans.description: Strengthen cash flow forecasting and working capital monitoring to prevent future liquidity stress

controls.name: Revenue Recognition Review - Combined Offerings
controls.description: Monthly review of revenue recognition for combined Benevity+ImpactHours product offerings to ensure ASC 606 compliance
controls.test_procedure: Select sample of 25 combined offering contracts and verify proper performance obligation identification and revenue allocation
controls.evidence_required: Contract review checklist, allocation calculations, management signoff

controls.name: Contract Modification Approval Workflow
controls.description: System-enforced approval workflow for all contract modifications requiring revenue impact assessment
controls.test_procedure: Attempt to process contract modification without required approvals; verify system rejection
controls.evidence_required: System configuration documentation, test results, approval audit log

controls.name: Variable Consideration Estimation Policy Compliance
controls.description: Quarterly review of variable consideration estimates to ensure consistency with documented policy
controls.test_procedure: Compare estimation methodology across sample of contracts to documented policy; identify variances
controls.evidence_required: Policy compliance checklist, variance analysis, corrective action documentation

controls.name: NRR Calculation and Reconciliation
controls.description: Monthly reconciliation of NRR calculations to investor reporting definitions with documented methodology
controls.test_procedure: Recalculate NRR from source data; compare to reported figure; verify methodology consistency
controls.evidence_required: Calculation workbook, methodology documentation, reconciliation signoff

controls.name: Customer Health Score Monitoring
controls.description: Weekly automated customer health score review with escalation triggers for at-risk enterprise accounts
controls.test_procedure: Verify automated alerting triggers for accounts below threshold; review escalation response times
controls.evidence_required: Alert logs, escalation records, intervention documentation

controls.name: Quarterly Business Reviews - Enterprise Accounts
controls.description: Structured quarterly business reviews with enterprise customers to identify satisfaction issues and expansion opportunities
controls.test_procedure: Review QBR completion rates; assess quality of captured issues; verify follow-up actions
controls.evidence_required: QBR records, action item tracker, customer feedback

controls.name: Implementation Resource Allocation Governance
controls.description: Weekly capacity planning and resource allocation review for customer implementations based on complexity assessment
controls.test_procedure: Review resource allocation decisions against capacity model; assess implementation delay rates
controls.evidence_required: Capacity model, allocation records, delay analysis

controls.name: Financial Close Checklist and Review
controls.description: Monthly financial close checklist including acquisition accounting, segment reporting, and management review signoff
controls.test_procedure: Review close checklist completion; verify all required signoffs obtained; test for completeness
controls.evidence_required: Completed close checklist, signoff log, reconciliation files

controls.name: Rolling Cash Flow Forecast
controls.description: Weekly 13-week rolling cash flow forecast with variance analysis against prior forecast and actual results
controls.test_procedure: Compare forecast to actual; analyze variance drivers; verify escalation of material variances
controls.evidence_required: Forecast model, variance analysis, escalation log

controls.name: Working Capital Dashboard and Escalation
controls.description: Weekly working capital metrics dashboard with defined escalation thresholds for DSO, DPO, and cash conversion cycle
controls.test_procedure: Verify dashboard accuracy; test escalation triggers; review response to threshold breaches
controls.evidence_required: Dashboard screenshots, alert logs, escalation documentation

controls.name: Privacy Impact Assessment - New Processing
controls.description: Privacy impact assessment required for all new data processing activities or significant changes to existing processing
controls.test_procedure: Review sample of new processing activities; verify PIA completion; assess quality of assessments
controls.evidence_required: PIA records, approval documentation, processing inventory

controls.name: Cross-Border Data Transfer Mechanism Review
controls.description: Annual review and refresh of transfer impact assessments for all cross-border data transfers
controls.test_procedure: Review TIA completion status; verify currency of assessments; identify gaps
controls.evidence_required: TIA inventory, assessment documents, gap analysis

controls.name: Data Subject Rights Request Management
controls.description: Automated tracking and fulfillment of data subject rights requests within regulatory timelines
controls.test_procedure: Review request completion times; verify compliance with regulatory deadlines; assess quality
controls.evidence_required: Request logs, response documentation, timing metrics

controls.name: Management Review of Financial Statements
controls.description: Monthly management review of draft financial statements with documented review and inquiry procedures
controls.test_procedure: Review management inquiry documentation; verify signoff; assess analytical procedures performed
controls.evidence_required: Review meeting minutes, inquiry log, analytical review workpapers

controls.name: Acquisition Accounting Review
controls.description: Detailed review of acquisition accounting entries including purchase price allocation and intangible asset valuation
controls.test_procedure: Review acquisition accounting entries against ASC 805 requirements; verify valuation support
controls.evidence_required: Valuation reports, allocation workpapers, accounting memo

controls.name: Integration PMO Milestone Tracking
controls.description: Weekly integration milestone tracking with variance analysis and escalation of delays exceeding one week
controls.test_procedure: Review milestone status; verify escalation of delays; assess corrective action effectiveness
controls.evidence_required: Project status reports, escalation logs, variance analysis

controls.name: Competitive Intelligence Review
controls.description: Monthly competitive intelligence review with analysis of competitor product announcements and market positioning
controls.test_procedure: Review competitive intelligence reports; assess coverage of key competitors; verify action items
controls.evidence_required: CI reports, competitor analysis, product team briefings

controls.name: Product Roadmap Governance
controls.description: Quarterly product roadmap review with competitive gap analysis and customer feedback incorporation
controls.test_procedure: Review roadmap decisions; verify competitive analysis input; assess customer feedback incorporation
controls.evidence_required: Roadmap documentation, competitive analysis, customer input summary

controls.name: Strategic Transformation Steering Committee
controls.description: Bi-weekly strategic transformation steering committee review of execution progress and risk mitigation
controls.test_procedure: Review steering committee minutes; verify risk discussion; assess decision follow-through
controls.evidence_required: Meeting minutes, action item tracker, risk register updates

controls.name: Board Strategic Update
controls.description: Monthly board update on strategic transformation progress with key metrics and risk indicators
controls.test_procedure: Review board materials; verify completeness of strategic update; assess board feedback incorporation
controls.evidence_required: Board presentations, meeting minutes, action items

controls.name: Sales Pipeline Stage Gate Review
controls.description: Weekly sales pipeline stage gate review to ensure deal qualification and forecast accuracy
controls.test_procedure: Audit stage gate transitions; verify qualification criteria; compare forecast to actuals
controls.evidence_required: Pipeline reports, stage transition logs, forecast accuracy metrics

controls.name: Win/Loss Analysis
controls.description: Monthly win/loss analysis with root cause identification and sales process improvement recommendations
controls.test_procedure: Review win/loss analysis completeness; verify action item generation; track improvement metrics
controls.evidence_required: Win/loss reports, root cause analysis, action item tracker

controls.name: Vulnerability Management Program
controls.description: Continuous vulnerability scanning with risk-based prioritization and remediation tracking
controls.test_procedure: Review vulnerability scan results; verify remediation timeliness; assess risk prioritization
controls.evidence_required: Scan reports, remediation tickets, metrics dashboard

controls.name: Access Control Review
controls.description: Quarterly user access review for all production systems with segregation of duties validation
controls.test_procedure: Select sample of user accounts; verify appropriate access; identify SoD violations
controls.evidence_required: Access review reports, manager signoffs, remediation evidence

controls.name: Security Incident Response
controls.description: Documented security incident response process with escalation procedures and post-incident review
controls.test_procedure: Review incident response logs; verify escalation adherence; assess post-incident review quality
controls.evidence_required: Incident tickets, escalation logs, post-incident reports

controls.name: Platform Availability Monitoring
controls.description: Real-time platform availability monitoring with automated alerting for service degradation
controls.test_procedure: Review alerting configuration; verify response to synthetic test failures; assess uptime metrics
controls.evidence_required: Monitoring dashboards, alert logs, incident response records

controls.name: Disaster Recovery Testing
controls.description: Annual disaster recovery test with documented recovery procedures and lessons learned
controls.test_procedure: Review DR test plan and results; verify RTO/RPO achievement; assess remediation of gaps
controls.evidence_required: DR test plan, execution results, lessons learned report

controls.name: Key Person Succession Planning
controls.description: Annual succession planning review for top 20 critical roles with development plans for successors
controls.test_procedure: Review succession plans; verify development plan progress; assess bench strength metrics
controls.evidence_required: Succession plans, development plans, bench strength report

controls.name: Knowledge Transfer and Documentation
controls.description: Critical process documentation and knowledge transfer requirements for key personnel
controls.test_procedure: Review documentation completeness; assess knowledge transfer sessions conducted; verify currency
controls.evidence_required: Process documentation, training records, knowledge base audit

controls.name: Critical Vendor Risk Assessment
controls.description: Annual risk assessment of critical vendors including security, financial stability, and operational capability
controls.test_procedure: Review vendor assessment completion; verify risk rating accuracy; assess remediation plans
controls.evidence_required: Vendor assessments, risk ratings, remediation tracker

controls.name: Vendor Performance Monitoring
controls.description: Quarterly vendor performance review against SLAs with escalation for underperformance
controls.test_procedure: Review SLA achievement; verify escalation of issues; assess corrective action effectiveness
controls.evidence_required: SLA dashboards, escalation logs, vendor meeting minutes

controls.name: ESG Reporting Validation
controls.description: Annual validation of ESG metrics and disclosures against reporting framework requirements
controls.test_procedure: Review ESG metrics methodology; verify data accuracy; assess disclosure completeness
controls.evidence_required: ESG data workbooks, methodology documentation, disclosure review checklist

control_assessments.test_evidence: Tested 25 combined offering contracts. All properly identified performance obligations and applied correct revenue allocation methodology per updated policy.
Attempted to submit contract modification without required approvals. System correctly rejected submission. Reviewed 15 approved modifications - all had proper approval chain documented.
Health score algorithm redesigned and deployed. Alert triggers functioning. However, 3 of 15 at-risk accounts reviewed showed delayed escalation response (>48 hours vs. 24-hour target).
Capacity model implemented and operational. However, 2 of 10 implementations reviewed showed resource allocation decisions made outside governance process.
Reviewed 13 weekly forecasts. Average variance to actual 7.2% (within 10% threshold). All material variances properly escalated per policy.
Reviewed 15 EU-Canada transfer mechanisms. 13 had current TIAs. 2 TIAs expired in Q1 2025 without refresh. Finding FND-9 issued.
Acquisition accounting review control in place. However, initial review did not identify documentation gaps in intangible valuations until audit identified issue.
Reviewed vulnerability management program. Critical vulnerabilities remediated within 7 days (target: 14 days). High vulnerabilities remediated within 21 days (target: 30 days).

control_deficiencies.description: Customer health score escalation response times exceeded 24-hour target in 20% of cases reviewed, averaging 48-72 hours
control_deficiencies.root_cause: New health score algorithm increased alert volume during transition period; CSM team adapting to new prioritization criteria
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement escalation automation with backup assignment; provide additional training on new algorithm interpretation

control_deficiencies.description: Implementation resource allocation decisions made outside established governance process for 2 of 10 implementations reviewed
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Capacity constraints during peak period led to informal resource decisions; governance process bypass not detected timely
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement system controls to require governance approval; weekly compliance monitoring by VP Professional Services

control_deficiencies.description: Two transfer impact assessments for EU-Canada data transfers not refreshed within required annual timeframe
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Manual TIA tracking process; increased volume from EMEA expansion exceeded process capacity
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement automated TIA expiration tracking with 60-day advance notification; complete outstanding assessments

control_deficiencies.description: Acquisition accounting review control did not include explicit checklist item for intangible asset valuation documentation completeness
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Checklist developed pre-acquisition; not updated for ImpactHours integration complexity; accelerated timeline reduced review depth
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Update acquisition accounting checklist with detailed valuation documentation requirements; engage external specialist for complex transactions

processes.name: Revenue Recognition and Billing
processes.description: End-to-end process for recognizing subscription revenue, processing customer billing, and ensuring ASC 606 compliance

processes.name: Contract Management
processes.description: Customer contract lifecycle management including negotiation, execution, modification, and renewal

processes.name: Financial Planning and Analysis
processes.description: Budgeting, forecasting, and financial performance analysis including key metric calculation and investor reporting

processes.name: Customer Success Management
processes.description: Customer health monitoring, engagement, and retention activities for enterprise accounts

processes.name: Customer Implementation and Onboarding
processes.description: New customer implementation, configuration, and onboarding to achieve time-to-value

processes.name: Financial Close and Reporting
processes.description: Monthly and quarterly financial close process including consolidation, reconciliation, and reporting

processes.name: Treasury and Cash Management
processes.description: Cash flow forecasting, working capital management, and liquidity monitoring

processes.name: Privacy and Data Protection
processes.description: Privacy program management including impact assessments, data subject rights, and cross-border transfers

processes.name: M&A Integration Management
processes.description: Acquisition integration planning, execution, and tracking including financial, operational, and technology workstreams

processes.name: Product Strategy and Roadmap
processes.description: Product strategy development, competitive analysis, and roadmap governance

processes.name: Strategic Transformation Governance
processes.description: Enterprise strategic transformation oversight, execution tracking, and risk management

processes.name: Sales Pipeline Management
processes.description: Sales opportunity management, forecasting, and pipeline quality governance

processes.name: Information Security Management
processes.description: Security operations, vulnerability management, access control, and incident response

processes.name: Platform Operations and Availability
processes.description: SaaS platform operations, availability monitoring, and disaster recovery

processes.name: Talent Management and Succession
processes.description: Key talent retention, succession planning, and knowledge management

processes.name: Vendor Risk Management
processes.description: Third-party vendor risk assessment, performance monitoring, and contract management

processes.name: ESG Reporting and Compliance
processes.description: Environmental, social, and governance metric tracking, validation, and external reporting

objectives.name: Sustainable Revenue Growth
objectives.description: Achieve sustainable revenue growth through enterprise customer acquisition and expansion while maintaining pricing discipline

objectives.name: Enterprise Customer Retention Excellence
objectives.description: Maintain best-in-class enterprise customer retention and expand customer lifetime value

objectives.name: Financial Health and Liquidity
objectives.description: Maintain adequate liquidity and achieve path to profitability while funding strategic investments

objectives.name: Regulatory Compliance and Trust
objectives.description: Maintain full compliance with privacy, data protection, and industry regulations across all jurisdictions

objectives.name: Strategic Transformation Success
objectives.description: Successfully execute enterprise-focused strategic pivot including ImpactHours integration and mid-market transition
objectives.target_metric: Integration milestones on-time, Synergy targets achieved

objectives.name: Operational Excellence
objectives.description: Deliver reliable platform operations and maintain organizational capability during transformation

standards_regulations.name: ASC 606 - Revenue from Contracts with Customers
standards_regulations.description: US GAAP standard for revenue recognition requiring identification of performance obligations and allocation of transaction price

standards_regulations.name: GDPR - General Data Protection Regulation
standards_regulations.description: Comprehensive data protection regulation governing processing of personal data of EU residents

standards_regulations.name: PIPEDA - Personal Information Protection and Electronic Documents Act
standards_regulations.description: Canadian federal privacy law governing private sector collection, use, and disclosure of personal information

standards_regulations.name: SOC 2 Type II
standards_regulations.description: Service organization control framework for security, availability, processing integrity, confidentiality, and privacy

standards_regulations.name: SOX - Sarbanes-Oxley Act (Readiness)
standards_regulations.description: US federal law requiring internal control over financial reporting for public companies

standards_regulations.name: CCPA/CPRA - California Consumer Privacy Act
standards_regulations.description: California state privacy law providing consumer rights over personal information

requirements.name: Performance Obligation Identification
requirements.description: Contracts must be analyzed to identify distinct performance obligations for proper revenue allocation

requirements.name: Transfer Impact Assessment
requirements.description: Cross-border data transfers to third countries must have documented transfer impact assessments

requirements.name: Access Control
requirements.description: Logical and physical access to systems and data must be restricted to authorized individuals

requirements.name: Internal Control over Financial Reporting
requirements.description: Management must establish and maintain adequate internal control over financial reporting

requirements.name: Data Subject Rights Response
requirements.description: Data subject rights requests must be fulfilled within 30 days of receipt

assessment_methods.name: Control Self-Assessment
assessment_methods.description: Process owners assess control design and operating effectiveness using standardized questionnaire

assessment_methods.name: Sample Testing
assessment_methods.description: Select statistical sample of transactions and verify control execution and effectiveness

assessment_methods.name: Quantitative Analysis
assessment_methods.description: Data-driven analysis of key metrics and performance indicators to assess risk levels

assessment_methods.name: Expert Judgment
assessment_methods.description: Subject matter expert assessment based on experience and industry knowledge

assessment_methods.name: Walkthroughs
assessment_methods.description: End-to-end process walkthrough with process owners to verify control design and implementation

assessment_methods.name: Automated Continuous Monitoring
assessment_methods.description: System-based monitoring of control indicators with automated exception alerting
